task: Validate blocker IDs, resolution evidence requirements, known-issue scope, and latest-state precedence.

blocker_register.scope: EC2 checkpoint, commit/push checkpoint, and target-runtime starts
blocker_register.does_not_block: non-EC2-safe local evidence, scaffolding, and tracker rows that do not require a clean checkpoint
blocker_register.resolution_evidence_required: new secret/git security evidence showing clean_worktree=true plus intentional handling of existing dirty changes

blocker_register.scope: live AWS/EC2 proof, emergency stop live proof, target-runtime execution
blocker_register.exact_condition: latest Wave64 TTL/live watchdog evidence is blocked by expired AWS session
blocker_register.does_not_block: local-only static validation, packaging, registry, source-cited blocker governance, and non-mask rows
blocker_register.resolution_evidence_required: fresh AWS auth/account gate evidence and bounded EC2 command evidence

blocker_register.exact_condition: no current EC2 runtime artifact set exists for this Wave64 run
blocker_register.does_not_block: non-runtime local work or future pullback after a real EC2 run
blocker_register.resolution_evidence_required: bounded EC2 runtime artifact set plus pullback manifest/hash verification evidence

blocker_register.scope: mask-dependent promotion, geometry authority, body/hand/contact validation, final mask QA, certification-ready claims, Wave71+ mask-proof activation
blocker_register.exact_condition: manual gold masks are still being created and candidate masks must not be consumed as truth
blocker_register.does_not_block: workflow structure, orchestration, logging, validation scaffolding, dataset organization, ComfyUI wiring that does not claim final mask truth, non-body-mask assets
blocker_register.resolution_evidence_required: manual gold-mask intake validation evidence and strict mask QA pass records

next_step: Advance to TRK-W64-050/ITEM-W64-050; use the active blocker register for latest-state precedence.
